problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
